items.claim: Fatima Klein's defensive wrestling needs improvement.
items.quote: I understand her wrestling still needs a little bit of work. I believe in her grappling needs some work as well

items.claim: Fatima Klein is a superior striker to most fighters in the 115-pound division.
items.quote: in pure striking fights she's beating a lot of fighters at 115

items.claim: Tatiana Suarez is a two-round fighter who cannot strike.
items.quote: Tatiana Suarez can't strike and is a two-round fighter.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is fighting too soon after being knocked out.
items.quote: I don't love the fact that he's fighting so soon after getting knocked out against Lance Gibson.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has shown a tendency to get knocked out easily in his recent fights.
items.quote: he is getting chinned over and over and over again.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is vulnerable to being taken down.
items.quote: we saw both Moises and Davis find success in taking down Ramirez.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is a physically strong and large fighter for the 155-pound division.
items.quote: I will say Chase Hooper is a strong guy for 155 lbs. He's a big guy for 155.

items.claim: Kevin Holland has a history of struggling against wrestlers.
items.quote: we've seen Holland struggle so much with wrestlers throughout his UFC career.

items.claim: Jacobe Smith is a high-level collegiate wrestler whose wrestling will carry his UFC career.
items.quote: the wrestling game of Jacobe Smith is going to be something that is something that is going to continue to carry him in his UFC career

items.claim: Kevin Holland has reportedly dropped out of his fight against Jacobe Smith due to injury.
items.quote: there have been reports circulating and floating around that Kevin Holland has dropped out of his fight um against Jacobe Smith due to an injury.
